field_changes.migration_note: Field 'doc_id' removed. Two-sprint minimum deprecation required. Each registry subscriber must acknowledge the removal.

Confidence scale changed 0.0-1.0 -> 0-100.0. CRITICAL: all downstream consumers using confidence as a probability (drift detection, edge-weight ranking) will be silently corrupted. Statistical baselines must be deleted and re-established post-migration.

possible_renames.reason: Same type (string) and 2 matching constraints suggest rename. Minimum 2-sprint deprecation with alias required before removing old name.
